name: Festive Vegetable Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart microwave-safe casserole, combine the vegetables, soup, milk, soy sauce, and 2/3 cup onions.
2. Microwave on HIGH for 10-12 minutes (or bake in an oven preheated to 375°F for 30-35 minutes), stirring occasionally, until the vegetables are hot.
3. Top with the remaining 2/3 cup onions. Serves 5.
